name: Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box Duncan Hines super moist yellow cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the crushed pineapple and cherries into an ungreased 9x13 inch cake pan.
2. Sprinkle the cake mix evenly over the top of the fruit.
3. Melt the margarine and pour it over the cake mixture.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour.
